name: nginx-multisite
description: Configures Nginx as a multi-site web server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed certificate generation, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects, security response headers, gzip compression, and a security hardening sub-recipe covering fail2ban, UFW firewall, SSH hardening, and sysctl kernel parameters.

name: cache
description: Provisions a dual caching layer with Memcached and Redis (password-authenticated), leveraging the memcached and redisio Supermarket cookbooks, and includes a post-install Ruby block that strips deprecated Redis config directives incompatible with the installed Redis version.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub, including system packages, a Python virtual environment, pip dependencies, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, a .env file with the database URL, and a systemd unit file for the uvicorn-based service.
